news.t: Free Cash Flow and Fixed Income Strategies Gaining Attention in Today's Market
Faith Meets Fundamentals: Timothy Plan Launches 3 New ETFs
Timothy Plan Launches Three ETFs Focused on Free Cash Flow and Fixed Income

holdings.infoBox: TPFG is an equity ETF with a total of 50 individual holdings. The top holdings are Seagate Technology Holdings stock at 6.06%, Western Digital at 5.50%, KLA Corporation at 4.87%, Caterpillar at 4.05%, and Amphenol at 3.88%.

overview.description: The Timothy Plan Free Cash Flow Growth ETF (TPFG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Victory Free Cash Flow Growth BRI index. The fund tracks an index of US large-cap growth companies selected for positive free cash flow trends and growth characteristics, while applying faith-based investment screens. TPFG was launched on May 5, 2026 and is issued by Timothy Plan.
infoTable: Victory Free Cash Flow Growth BRI Index
